title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 18 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 18 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 18 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/12/2024
Today, iron ore futures fluctuated downward. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at 778.5 yuan/mt, down 2.63%throughout the day. Traders showed a weak willingness to sell, while steel mills were cautiously observing, with a slight increase in purchase willingness.
